news.t: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
First Trust Premiers Its First Laddered Autocallable Barrier & Income ETF

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Autocallable Barrier & Income ETF (ACYN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF that uses swaps to synthetically invest in a laddered portfolio of autocallable notes referencing one or more US broad-based index. The fund aims for income with limited downside cushion. ACYN was launched on Feb 24, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Advisors L.P. Announces Distributions for Exchange-Traded Funds
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. ("FTA") announces the declaration of the monthly distributions for certain exchange-traded funds advised by FTA. The following dates apply to ...
